meaning: n.面貌的一部分(眼,口,鼻等)特征,容貌,特色,特写vt.是...的特色,特写,放映vi.起重要作用
examples: His eyes are his most notable feature.
This feature is designed to aid inexperienced users.
Teamwork is a key feature of the training programme.
Its scale and sheer size as a natural feature is what makes it so awesome.
Dumb economic thinking has been a feature of energy legislation at least since 1973.
